creator: lalberto@sat.net
text:
While trying to install 5.0 several packages are not being installed.  The full screen message: Add of package ical-2.2 aborted, error code 1 - Please check the debug screen for more info.  This has ocurred with several packages, not just the one mentioned above.

How-To-Repeat: This had also happened during installation of FreeBSD 4.0.
